title: R3 Corpus v3 Frontmatter Schema
description: Frontmatter contract for the R3 RAG system. Companion to docs/worklogs/rag-r3-corpus-v3-contract.md. Custom invariants (aliases ⊥ expected_queries, role-conditional requirements not expressible in pure JSON Schema) enforced separately by scripts/learning/rag/corpus_lint.py:check_corpus_v3_pilot_frontmatter.

schema_version.description: Must be exactly 3 for v3 contract docs.

concept_id.description: Stable concept identifier in 'category/slug' format. Both parts are kebab-case.

canonical.description: If true, this is the canonical doc for concept_id (Wave 2).

category.description: Corpus category, must match folder placement under knowledge/cs/contents/.

doc_role.description: Doc role taxonomy (8 values). See contract §3.

level.description: Learner level the doc is targeted at.

language.description: Dominant language of the doc body. Wave 2 required.

source_priority.description: Citation authority weight. 90-100 canonical, 70-89 deep_dive/bridge, 50-69 supplementary, <50 legacy. Wave 2 required.

mission_ids.description: Woowa Tech Course mission identifiers. Required for doc_role=mission_bridge.

aliases.description: The single lexical hint channel. Indexed into lexical_sidecar:aliases. MUST be disjoint from expected_queries (enforced by corpus_lint.py).

symptoms.description: Symptom phrases as a learner would describe the bug. Required for doc_role=symptom_router and doc_role=playbook.

intents.description: Which query intents this doc serves. Wave 2 required.

prerequisites.description: Concept_id refs the learner should know before this. Optional graph metadata.

next_docs.description: Concept_id refs the learner should read after. Optional graph metadata.

linked_paths.description: Direct path refs for companion expansion. Optional.

confusable_with.description: Concept_id refs of confusable concepts. Required for doc_role=chooser (≥ 2).

forbidden_neighbors.description: Path refs that should NOT be retrieved for queries about this concept. Wave 2 required for qrel-risk cohort.

expected_queries.description: Qrel seed strings. Used by r3.eval.qrels.qrels_from_frontmatter_doc to populate initial qrels. STRICTLY NOT INDEXED — corpus_loader._emit_chunks no longer accepts this as a parameter (commit 054a1a3). Disjoint from aliases (enforced by corpus_lint).

contextual_chunk_prefix.description: Optional per-doc override for the contextual chunk prefix. By default, the indexer auto-generates per-chunk prefixes (Anthropic Contextual Retrieval pattern, 50-100 tokens via Claude 3 Haiku) at index build time. If this field is set, it is used instead for all chunks of this doc.
